project.name: STRATUM
project.description: A unified multi-agent orchestration and governance layer for enterprise systems.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-black
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align for dense data, center-align only for empty states or explicit modular hero blocks

surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Not recommended for this archetype. Use solid, opaque surfaces.
surfaces_and_borders.surface_style: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look): Expose the skeleton. Containers have border-collapse style layout. Items have 1px borders.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none). High contrast. Primary uses International Klein Blue, stark white text.
components.cards: Cardless or 1px border. No shadows. Dense padding (p-4 or p-6).
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but with rounded-none and 1px borders. Focus ring must be primary blue and crisp.
components.navigation: Collapsible left sidebar for F-pattern scanning. Top header for breadcrumbs and user profile. Use solid backgrounds.
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts. Use monochrome base with primary/accent colors for data series. No gradients in charts, solid fills or 2px lines only.
components.tables: Dense rows, 1px bottom border per row. Hover state must highlight the entire row with a subtle gray (surface_hover).

motion.hover: Instant or very fast (100ms) transition. Border color darken, slight background tint shift.
motion.interactions: Crisp feedback. No bounce or elastic easing. Use 'ease-out' or linear for a mechanical feel.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight. 20px (w-5 h-5) default size.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric pattern, strict grid lines, monochromatic with a single sharp red accent. For use on Login/Auth screens.
Detailed view of a server rack. Can be used in 'Settings' or 'Integrations' hero banner if needed.

pages_and_features.name: Dashboard Overview
pages_and_features.details: F-pattern layout. Top left: Active Agents, Success Rate. Right/Below: Modular bento grid for Agent Topology. Use line charts for execution success over time.

pages_and_features.name: Agent Registry
pages_and_features.details: Dense list with robust global filtering. Top-right 'Create Agent' CTA.

pages_and_features.name: Workflow DAG Visualization
pages_and_features.details: Use Recharts/React Flow if DAG is needed. 1px connecting lines, sharp right-angle elbows, stark white nodes.

pages_and_features.name: Execution Runs
pages_and_features.details: Left side: scrolling list of runs. Right side: Trace viewer (JSON-like logs, step-by-step progress bars).

pages_and_features.name: Policy Engine & Governance
pages_and_features.details: Bento layout for rules: Rate limiting inputs, cost tracking charts, HITL approval queue list.

pages_and_features.name: Enterprise Integrations
pages_and_features.details: Cards representing Jira, Slack, Teams, Salesforce. 'Connect' or 'Manage' buttons. Simple SVG logos preferred (e.g., via lucide-react or phosphor).

pages_and_features.name: Authentication
pages_and_features.details: Left side uses the `hero_background` image overlaid with brand text. Right side is the stark login form.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-form-submit-button'`).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use Text Shadow over images if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Use strict grid layouts and cardless designs with 1px borders (rounded-none).
Follow the 'Color is Function Only' rule: 95% of UI is monochrome, blue/red/yellow are for actions/states.
Build the dashboard using a collapsible F-pattern sidebar.
